artifact_refs.description: Manual notebook that records the selected Allstate preprocessing path for TC1.
Run-level metadata for the human baseline.
Per-action mapping from CA-IDs to notebook evidence and selection rationale.
Author notes for the migrated and refreshed human baseline.

notes: I treated this as a quick first-pass Allstate baseline rather than an answer-key reconstruction. I kept the two steps I would almost certainly do immediately: drop the identifier and label-encode cat1-cat116 with train+test levels. I did not include the target log transform in this baseline, even though it is in the curated bank, because I wanted the artifact to reflect an imperfect human pass rather than a perfect migration from the candidate bank.
